subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the burning flame! Behold the mercy of the All-Merciful, exalted in the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل بالنار الموقده رایت رحمن است که بلند در اسمانست
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
